narrative:
Worth 4-D (precinct in Franklin County) has 495 registered voters — a small sample, so the figures below carry meaningful statistical uncertainty. Republican-leaning voters make up 26.7% of registrants and Democratic-leaning voters account for 28.3%, a narrow Democratic lean of 1.6 percentage points.
